move revia forward from dalet to tav
what: Moved revi`a to the letter ת in "וְ֝יָדַעְתָּ֗" (as it appears in AC, and apparently also in LC, and in other manuscripts). The printed versions have it on the penultimate syllable (וְ֝יָדַ֗עְתָּ), although Van der Hought (Amsterdam, 1705) and derivative editions note "וְ֝יָדַעְתָּ֗" as an alternative reading. Credit to Moshe Greenberg.

refine: remove dagesh/mapiq/shuruq-dot from dalet
what: Removed dagesh from the letter ד in "דִכֵּ֥ן"; LC has rapheh (although it has a slight blemish in the parchment which may be a scratch from erasure). Credit to Moshe Greenberg.

refine: on qof, replace patax with qamats

refine: on tsadi, replace revia with zaqef-qatan
